title: P0: Fix creative gather/craft/smelt — add IsCreativeMode guards to decomposers
description: GatherItemDecompose, DecomposeCraftItem, and DecomposeSmeltItem unconditionally emit MineBlock actions regardless of game mode. In creative mode, mining drops nothing, so these goals never complete. Add IsCreativeMode guard clauses that emit /give @p <itemId> <count> via Chat action instead. Sprint 57 Wave D fixed this.
